lifecycle.name: Scheduling & Coordination
lifecycle.description: Calendar, scheduling, and coordination workers usable across every vertical

workers.name: Scheduling
workers.capabilitySummary: Cross-vertical scheduling worker. Coordinates calendars, events, and appointments via Google Calendar (Workspace Integration Layer). Domain-specific behavior layers in per use case — RE adds buyer driving-time optimization, Aviation adds duty-time and currency integration, Healthcare adds patient-visit and intake routing, Legal adds consultation booking. Same worker substrate, different RAAS modules per vertical.
workers._notes: CODEX 50.18 follow-up 2026-05-11. Sean's call: standalone generic scheduler usable beyond RE. Future GEN-* workers will join this catalog (Reminders, Notes, Tasks, Whiteboard, etc.).
